nasb.text: I am no longer worthy to be called your son; make me as one of your hired men.” ’

esv.text: I am no longer worthy to be called your son. Treat me as one of your hired servants.”’

cnv.text: 不配再稱為你的兒子，把我當作一個雇工吧！’

ccb.text: 今后，我再也不配做你的儿子，请把我当作雇工看待吧。’

csbs.text: 我再也不配称为你的儿子，请把我当做你的一个雇工吧。’
